name: 'Study Zone - Jaipur Rajasthan'
description:
'

Study Zone is a platform where budding generation of science can build their foundation and nurture their talent to achieve career goals. Their utmost priority is the commitment towards imparting quality education and making each student fully equipped with basic concepts and their applications. You are welcome here to enhance your knowledge and taking initiative towards a right career.

rn

We wish you all the best and a bright future ahead with us.

rn

 

rn

Vision:

rn

“To serve the society through providing the best quality education to the students so that they can build up their foundation for the engineering and medical to finally achieve their goal.”

rn

 

rn

 Mission:

rn
    rn
  • To provide a platform where students can enhance their knowledge.
    • rn
  • To create a well qualified and experienced team which can make the change.
    • rn
  • To maintain effective pedagogy.
    • rn
  • To create healthy competitive environment.
    • rn
rn

Study Zone is Committed Towards Quality Education and they provide coaching for below classes.

rn
    rn
  • IX & X for Science & Maths
    • rn
  • XI & XII for Physics

name: 'CLATPREP EDUCATION
description:
'

CLATPREP EDUCATION

rn

CLATPREP Education has started by a team of experts in Jaipur. It is one of the best CLAT preparation institutes in India. We equip the most student friendly classroom coaching with our 10 + years of experienced faculty. We guide our students in a way that they aquire the skills to crack the CLAT exam. ClatPrep Jaipur subscribes to an Mature and academic value driven philosophy.

rn

We encourage students to ask their doubts  freely so that our experience faculties who were toppers of CAT and MAT exams can provide maximum assistance. The more you practice the more the chances of success. So we train our students to achieve their success within minimum time periods. We have one of the best faculty team having an aim to challenge our own limits

name: 'Step Ahead Public School
description:
'

Step Ahead Public School (SAPS) is one of the Co-educational school affiliated to C.B.S.E board in Jaipur district Rajasthan. You can book it anytime from December 1 st and will spread its wings from April on wards. This is a school with World class standard and aims to provide education for all class of student's. It also supports the mission " Beti Bachao Beti Padhao" providing 100 % free education to girl students.

rn

Special Features

rn
    rn
  • We have 21 years of experience in the field of education.
    • rn
  • Highly qualified and competent teachers.
    • rn
  • Teacher- student's ratio -1: 20.
    • rn
  • Bridge course for every student.
    • rn
  • 7 Bheega lush green campus.
    • rn
  • Fully ventilated huge class rooms and state of art school building.
    • rn
  • One hour games section in morning keeps student's healthy and fresh.
    • rn
  • Cricket academy
